proposals.reason: New MDCG guidance sets concrete Q3 2026 deadlines for SSCP reporting in EUDAMED, impacting manufacturer vigilance processes.

card.t: MDCG 2026-4: SSCP Reporting Requirements in EUDAMED
card.x: New mandatory requirements for incident reporting formats and timelines in EUDAMED. Manufacturers must update vigilance procedures before Q3 2026.

proposals.reason: First standard dedicated to ML risk management, critical for AI-based medical devices ahead of AI Act enforcement.

card.x: First standard for ML-specific risks: algorithmic bias, performance degradation, training data issues. Requires continuous post-market validation.

proposals.reason: Expanded to include all device classes with new traceability obligations and incident reporting deadlines.

card.x: UDI registration in ARTG now mandatory with strengthened incident reporting deadlines. Applies to all device classes.

proposals.reason: New Swiss registration requirement affects EU manufacturers exporting to Switzerland, with year-end deadline for existing devices.

card.x: All devices must be registered before market entry. Existing devices must register by 31 Dec 2026. Coordinate with Swiss authorized representatives.

proposals.reason: New regulation changes NB audit procedures, requiring manufacturers to strengthen QMS documentation by Q3 2026.

card.x: Stricter auditor competence criteria and post-certification surveillance. Expect more detailed audits on risk management and vigilance for Class III devices.

proposals.reason: Updated CNIL methodologies simplify clinical research data procedures, affecting ongoing and new investigations.

card.x: Simplified procedures for health data research. Compliance exempts from CNIL prior authorization. Review clinical investigation protocols before new studies.

proposals.reason: New guidance clarifies distributor UDI responsibilities when modifying labeling, affecting contractual arrangements.

card.t: MDCG 2026-5: UDI Attribution Between Manufacturers & Distributors
card.x: Clarifies when distributors become responsible for secondary UDI after label modifications. Review distributor contracts to define UDI responsibilities.

proposals.reason: Revised classification guidance adds practical examples for software and combined devices, may trigger reclassification reviews.

card.t: MDCG 2021-24 Rev.1: Updated Device Classification Guidance
card.x: New practical examples for Rule 11 (software) and Rule 15 (combined devices). Review classification for connected devices and digital platforms.
